sessionName: Hyp B — long run punted to Sun 7-19
intro: Long run 60 min punted to Sun 7-19 (athlete call; per 2.A push-to-Sun allowance). Bumps today: chest-supp row 75->80 (Adj #156); seated calf 345->355 ONLY on a clean lift-day AM Achilles read, else stay 345 (Adj #160).

table.cue: Clean 4x8 with set 3 RIR 1 -> bump-eligible 170 next Sat (Adj #155)
75->80 — ladder condition met W12; one 5-lb step at a time (Adj #156)
Rebuild to all 4 sets in the 12-15 band before any further move (Adj #157)

table.exercise: Preacher curl uni, semi-supinated if available

table.cue: Hold-until-clean: set 3 RIR 1+ at 12 clears it (Adj #159)
Rebuild to 3x10 with reserve; no revert to BW (Adj #161)

table.rir: sets 1-3 RIR 1+, last set only to failure
table.cue: Adj #160 AM gate; keep the Adj #146 cap shape
Rested re-read — normal rest between sets this time (Adj #162)

lift.warmup: Pre-lift wrist-extensor isometric 3x30 s/arm (10.A). 1-2 min dynamic: band pull-aparts, scap push-ups.
lift.cooldown: Tyler twists 3x15 + reverse Tyler 3x15 (daily dose). Daily SI prehab.

currentLoads.lastVerified: W13 Tue 7/14 (Build debut: 150×5 RIR 3 top + AMRAP 135×12 RIR 0)
currentLoads.note: 150 BUMP LANDED at the RPE 7 target — two clicks clear of the ≤RIR 1 revert (Adj #148 resolved); AMRAP 135×12 → e1RM ~189, TM 168 stands. §5 clean-reps rule → bump 155 next Tue (1×5 @ 155 + AMRAP @ 135); if 155×5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 150 (Adj #168)

Started at 170 by mistake — the 170 opener hit a clean 8 @ RIR 1 (ceiling evidence), then set 2 lost the 8-floor and the intended 165 ran both sets to failure. Hold 165 — bump-eligible 170 on a clean 4×8 with set 3 RIR 1 (Adj #155)
Ladder condition MET — sets 1-2 both RIR 1+, full 3×10 with headroom on every set; first clean outing since the reset. Bump 80 next Sat (Adj #156)

Tightest mid-block of the 6-set dose (2/1/1 vs W12's 2/2/2), closer to failure at 13 — but the opener held RIR 3. Hold 30 — don't bump on a soft opener; a firm opener (≤RIR 2) opens the bump conversation (Adj #127/#149/#169)
35 landed on load, not reps — sets 1-2 in-band with tighter openers, sets 3-4 fell below the 12 floor to failure. Hold 35, rebuild to all-4-in-band (Adj #157)

65→70 BUMP LANDED (Adj #150 resolved) — near-identical landing shape to the 65 debut: sets 1-3 held the 10 floor behind an RIR 2 opener, set 4 fell to 8. Hold 70; bump-eligible 75 on an Adj #150-shape outing. Sat slot unaffected (Adj #170)
Best Sat outing of the cycle — sets 1-3 all at the 12 target with real reserve up front, back half still to failure. Hold 60; the clean-with-reps-to-spare condition stands (Adj #158)

Set 3 climbed 9→11 (best at 25) but still RIR 0, set 4 cratered to 6 — hold-until-clean (set 3 RIR 1+ at 12) not met. Hold 25 both slots. Elbow fully clean — 4th consecutive clean session, §10.A clock intact (Adj #171)
Opener drifted to RIR 4 one week after landing at the prescribed RIR 3; set 2 RIR 2. One soft set — hold 135; a repeat RIR 4 opener next Tue → one-step nudge 140 (Adj #173)

Headroom RESTORED — ran exactly to the cap (sets 1-3 RIR 1+, last set only to failure at 13). Adj #135 condition met → bump 355 next Sat on a clean lift-day AM Achilles read (Adj #160). Achilles clean through the 7-13 maximal TT and the 7-14 lift day (Adj #164/#174)

currentLoads.load: BW+10 lb at BOTH slots (hold, rebuild) — Tue to 3×12, Sat to 3×10
currentLoads.note: Tue rebuild not met — vs the debut, set 1 gave up 2 reps and its reserve, set 2 gained 2, set 3 fell to 6. Hold +10 both slots, rebuild to slot rep targets with set 3 RIR 1-2; no revert to BW (Adj #152/#161/#172)
Re-read confounded — ran out of time, both sets back-to-back with no rest. Hold 130; re-evaluate on a rested outing (Adj #162)
